personas: Persona 1: Tech-Savvy Millennial - Age 25-35, comfortable with digital tools, values efficiency and intuitive design.
Persona 2: Busy Professional - Age 30-45, limited time, needs quick access to key features, prefers minimal distractions.
key_flows: User onboarding and account setup flow emphasizing ease and guidance.
Primary task completion flow focusing on efficient navigation and feedback.
friction_points: Confusing navigation leading to difficulty in finding key features.
Overly complex forms causing user drop-off during onboarding.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content is organized from general to specific, starting with dashboard overview, then detailed sections accessible via primary navigation.
navigation: Top-level navigation with main categories: Dashboard, Tasks, Messages, Settings.
Secondary navigation within each category to access sub-features or filters.
categorization: Tasks categorized by status: To Do, In Progress, Completed.
Messages categorized by type: Inbox, Sent, Archived.

components: Right main content area for detailed views and interactions

responsive.mobile: Single-column layout with collapsible hamburger menu for navigation, full-width content area.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar to maximize content space.
responsive.desktop: Persistent two-column layout with visible sidebar and main content area.

design_system.typography: Primary font: Sans-serif, 16px base size, 1.5 line height for body text; Headings use scalable sizes (H1: 32px, H2: 24px, H3: 18px).
design_system.colors: Primary blue (#005FCC), secondary gray (#6E6E6E), background white (#FFFFFF), accent orange (#FF6600), error red (#D32F2F).
design_system.spacing: 8px base spacing unit; margins and paddings use multiples (8px, 16px, 24px, 32px).
components: Buttons: primary, secondary, disabled states with consistent padding and border-radius.
Forms: input fields with clear labels, error messages, and focus outlines.
Cards: subtle shadow and rounded corners for grouping content.

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard with logical tab order and visible focus states.
accessibility.screen_reader: Use semantic HTML elements, ARIA labels where necessary, and ensure dynamic content updates are announced.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for text and interactive elements against background.

interactions.animations: Subtle fade and slide transitions for modal dialogs and dropdowns with 200ms duration to enhance user feedback without distraction.
interactions.loading_state: Spinner centered in content area with descriptive text indicating loading progress.
interactions.empty_state: Illustration and message explaining no data availability with actionable suggestions.
